---
title: "Visualizations & Data Work"
description: "A collection of my R programming and data visualization projects."
---

## Data Science and R Programming Projects

Below is a collection of my coursework and projects focused on data visualization, data types, and data import/export in R.

::: {style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr)); gap: 2rem; margin-top: 2rem; margin-bottom: 4rem;"}

::: {style="border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 20px; border-radius: 8px; background: #fff;"}
### M03: Data Visualization Demo
A demonstration of plotting techniques and foundational data visualization using R.
<br><br>
[View Project (HTML)](M03-Demo.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
:::

::: {style="border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 20px; border-radius: 8px; background: #fff;"}
### M07: R Data Types
An exploration of foundational R data types and structures.
<br><br>
[View Application (HTML)](M07-DataTypes.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
:::

::: {style="border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 20px; border-radius: 8px; background: #fff;"}
### M08: Advanced Data Types Reflection
A reflective essay on working with advanced data structures in R.
<br><br>
[View Reflection (HTML)](M08-Reflection.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
:::

::: {style="border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 20px; border-radius: 8px; background: #fff;"}
### M09: Data Import and Export
An application assignment demonstrating how to effectively import, clean, and export data in R.
<br><br>
[View Application (HTML)](M09-ImportExport.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
:::

:::
